Plaintiff Cooks Company Produce, Inc.'S Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses (2) Compelling Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Genuineness Of Documents And The Truth Of Matters Specified In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Eden Restaurant Llc And Jason Fox
Off Calendar May-23-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The court ruled as follows:
Plaintiff Cooks Company Produce, Inc.'s Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses (2) Compelling Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Genuineness Of Documents And The Truth Of Matters Specified In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Eden Restaurant LLC And Jason Fox is taken off calendar for Plaintiff's counsel failure to appear despite a hearing was required. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =302/hk

Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Compelling Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Genuineness Of The Documents And The Truth Of Matters Specified In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Eden Restaurant Llc And Jason Fox.
Off Calendar May-23-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; PLAINTIFF COOKS COMPANY PRODUCE, INC'S Motion For An Order (1) Compelling Discovery Responses, (2) Compelling Production Of Documents, (3) Deeming The Genuineness Of The Documents And The Truth Of Matters Specified In The Request For Admissions As Admitted, And (4) Imposing Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Eden Restaurant Llc And Jason Fox IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. Prevailing party to prepare Order. Judge Pro tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.
